name: Exness
description_short: High-volume global forex and CFD broker with unlimited leverage, instant withdrawals, and tight spreads across 200+ instruments.
description_long:
Exness is a major global forex and CFD broker that has grown rapidly to become one of the highest-volume retail brokers in the world, reporting over $4 trillion in monthly trading volume. Founded in 2008, Exness is regulated by the FCA, CySEC, FSA (Seychelles), and other authorities.

Exness is known for its high leverage offerings (up to unlimited leverage for qualifying accounts), instant withdrawals (processed automatically 24/7), and tight spreads starting from 0.0 pips on professional accounts. The broker supports MetaTrader 4, MetaTrader 5, and its own Exness Terminal web platform.

The product range includes forex, metals, energies, indices, stocks, and cryptocurrencies. Exness offers multiple account types: Standard (no commission, spreads from 0.3 pips), Raw Spread ($3.50 per side, from 0.0 pips), Zero (no spread on top 30 instruments, from $3.50 per side), and Pro (no commission, from 0.1 pips, instant execution). The broker is popular in Asia, Africa, and the Middle East.
pros: Multiple account types for different strategies
Massive trading volume ensures deep liquidity
cons: Not available to US or EU residents (regulatory restrictions)
Customer support quality varies by region
Limited research and educational content compared to IG or OANDA
